steps.title: Use the paradox
steps.content: The text says water is critical to life-related reactions, yet its presence during early Earth's ocean-covered period created a problem for biomolecule formation. The blank needs a word meaning hindered.

steps.title: Choose the obstacle
steps.content: A means indicated, C means copied, and D means took advantage of; none creates the contrast. A word meaning impeded or made more difficult fits the paradox. The answer is B.
